criteria.criterion: `rebar verify-commit-ticket` in a fresh linked worktree (no .tickets-tracker) auto-mounts (symlink to main repo store) and resolves the id, instead of 'ticket store not found' — regression test.

`explain` (and init/scratch) are NOT force-mounted — they keep working with no store — guard test.
REBAR_TRACKER_DIR override still short-circuits the gate (tests/embedding unaffected).
